item.title: Do not invite big-tech to join your digital autonomy discussion 摘要
item.description:
The author recounts attending an event on European digital autonomy, only to discover that major US tech companies like Microsoft, Google, and Amazon were also present and presenting. Despite the focus on reducing dependencies, the author acknowledges that these companies will still play a role in Europe's digital future, suggesting that cooperation with them is acceptable as long as Europe maintains strategic autonomy.
标签: digital autonomy, Europe, big tech, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, digital dependencies, technology policy, event

item.title: Quoting Georgi Gerganov 摘要
item.description:
Georgi Gerganov, creator of llama.cpp, attests that Qwen3.6-27B is a highly capable local model for coding tasks. He has used it daily for over a month on M2 Ultra and RTX 5090 hardware, primarily for small mundane tasks at ggml-org. He uses a lightweight harness with pi agent in offline mode and a short system prompt to align with his style. He notes he would use it more if not for PR review duties.
标签: Qwen, local-LLMs, coding, AI-assisted-programming, llama.cpp, pi-agent, hardware, developer-tools, open-source, machine-learning

item.title: New in the App Store: Personalized Recommendations 摘要
item.description:
Apple announced at WWDC 2026 new App Store features including Personalized Collections and App Notes, which tailor app recommendations based on user interests and behavior. However, security researchers Mysk reported that the App Store app sends detailed analytics data, including character-by-character typing, to Apple for purposes beyond search suggestions, raising privacy concerns.
标签: Apple, App Store, personalization, privacy, analytics, WWDC, iOS, security, recommendations, keylogging

item.title: Ada Palmer – Machiavelli is the most misunderstood thinker of all time 摘要
item.description:
Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about Machiavelli, focusing on his life, context, and the writing of 'The Prince.' Machiavelli, a diplomat for Florence, was tortured and exiled by the Medici in 1513. He wrote 'The Prince' as a guide for Lorenzo de' Medici to unify Italy, driven by the instability of Italian city-states and the papacy's unpredictable power. Palmer explains how frequent regime changes and papal nepotism created chaos, making Machiavelli's insights urgent. The episode also covers his analytical innovations, the role of Cesare Borgia, and why Machiavelli is often misunderstood.
标签: Machiavelli, The Prince, Renaissance, Florence, Italian history, political philosophy, papacy, Cesare Borgia, Ada Palmer, podcast

item.title: Partial fraction decomposition 摘要
item.description:
Partial fraction decomposition is typically taught in calculus as a technique for integrating rational functions. However, the concept extends beyond integration: it applies to complex analysis, where every rational function decomposes into simple fractions over complex numbers, and to abstract algebra, where the decomposition generalizes to fields of fractions over principal ideal domains (PIDs). For example, over the integers, rational numbers can be expressed as sums of fractions with prime power denominators. The existence of such decompositions is useful for theoretical proofs, even when explicit computation is impractical due to the difficulty of factoring high-degree polynomials.
标签: partial fractions, rational functions, calculus, complex analysis, abstract algebra, principal ideal domain, polynomial factorization, number theory, integration, mathematics

item.title: 10Gb/s Ethernet: switching to a Broadcom SFP+ module 摘要
item.description:
The author upgraded their home LAN to 10Gb/s using 10GBASE-T SFP+ modules, but the Marvell-based MikroTik S+RJ10 module in their study switch overheated and flapped, causing network instability. After research, they replaced it with a Broadcom-based 10Gtek ASF-10G-T80-INT module, which runs cooler and more reliably. The new module impersonates an Intel fiber-optic module in EEPROM, so temperature monitoring via SNMP is no longer available, but CPU temperatures dropped by about 5°C and link stability has been flawless for two weeks.
标签: networking, 10GbE, SFP+, 10GBASE-T, home lab, overheating, Broadcom, MikroTik, hardware upgrade, troubleshooting

item.title: Key, in sight 摘要
item.description:
This is a comprehensive 9,400-word guide on keyboard customization, covering everything from keycap materials and profiles to switch types, stabilizers, and lubrication. It explains how to choose components based on typing feel, sound, and aesthetics, and provides step-by-step instructions for building or modifying a mechanical keyboard. The guide also discusses common tools, techniques for soldering and desoldering, and tips for programming custom keymaps. It aims to help both beginners and enthusiasts create a personalized typing experience.
标签: keyboard, customization, mechanical keyboard, keycaps, switches, stabilizers, lubrication, soldering, DIY, typing

item.title: Debugging on Prod 摘要
item.description:
The author describes debugging a production-only 500 error on their blog after a redesign. The issue was caused by a PHP caching mechanism where `empty($value)` evaluated to `true` for `$value = 0`, sending an invalid header. Locally, Apache ignored the malformed header, but production PHP-FPM rejected it, causing the error. The root cause was a combination of PHP's `empty()` behavior and the difference between Apache and PHP-FPM header handling. The author also notes that AI-generated code (GitHub Copilot) introduced a separate infinite recursion bug in a Markdown library, highlighting the need for careful review of LLM-generated code.
标签: debugging, PHP, production, caching, headers, PHP-FPM, Apache, AI code generation, GitHub Copilot, web development
